title: Al3x's Better Rabbits
description: A pack that remakes the way that we see bunnies in minecraft with a vanilla and realistic touch.
body:
![_________________________________________________________________](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66f9e9c4ff640eadd90078dd637d3ddc9c5b5316.png)

A pack that changes the vanilla texture of the rabbit giving it a revamp!

![_________________________________________________________________](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c82707b020a2025c1587ccaf8a9da778fc8f3e0.png)

This pack revamps the rabbit texture to a vanilla like new texture, with a few upgrades. This pack will count with more variants in a near future , so, stay tunned!
